section.heading: Payment of non-Federal share for certain Federal grant programs
section.chapeau: Amounts made available to carry out this subtitle shall be available for the payment of the non-Federal share for any project carried out under another Federal grant program—

paragraph.content: for which a Commission is not the sole or primary funding source; and
that is consistent with the authorities of the applicable Commission.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 118–272, div. B, title II, § 2244(a), Jan. 4, 2025, 138 Stat. 3204.)
